Records.authors: Bönisch, Kilian, Duhr, Claude, Fischbach, Fabian, Klemm, Albrecht, Nega, Christoph
Records.description: Four-loop equal-mass banana in d=2-2eps. First numerical results to O(eps^2). Associated CY threefold with h^{2,1}=1. 4th-order self-adjoint PF operator. No representation in classical transcendentals known.

Four-loop equal-mass banana integral in D=2-2eps dimensions. Related to a Calabi-Yau 3-fold. First appearance of a non-trivial Y-invariant Y_2 in the eps-factorised differential equation. Singular points at x in {1,9,25}. Five master integrals. The eps-factorised form was previously given in arXiv:2211.04292. The special local normal form of the Picard-Fuchs operator is theta_q^2 (1/Y_2) theta_q^2.

Four-loop equal-mass banana (sunrise) integral in D=2-2eps. Associated to a Calabi-Yau 3-fold (CY operator #34 in Almkvist et al.). First Feynman integral related to a non-trivial CY manifold for which an epsilon-factorised differential equation is established. Five master integrals; the construction uses a 'Yukawa coupling' function K arising from the non-symmetric-product structure of the Picard-Fuchs operator. Nine-letter symbol alphabet defined in terms of q-expansion functions. Singular points at y=-1,-1/9,-1/25 (i.e. p^2/m^2=1,9,25).
